laws.name: temperature anomaly (C) as function of years since 1980
laws.description: temperature anomaly (C) follows a power_law relationship with years since 1980 (R^2=0.852, p=0.000000)

laws.name: orbital period (years) as function of semi-major axis (AU)

theories.name: Law of temperature anomaly (C)-years since 1980 Relationship
theories.statement: temperature anomaly (C) follows a power_law relationship with years since 1980 (R^2=0.852, p=0.000000)
theories.explanation: temperature anomaly (C) follows a power law with years since 1980. This suggests scale-invariant dynamics, common in complex systems.
theories.mechanism: Scale-free relationship between years since 1980 and temperature anomaly (C)
testable_predictions: temperature anomaly (C) will continue to follow power_law relationship with years since 1980
Changing years since 1980 will produce power_law change in temperature anomaly (C)
limitations: Relationship may not hold outside observed range
